features.name: Background Bug Fix + checkEat Unification
features.description: Fix BackgroundSystem downgrade bug on level-up (L1395 replaces BackgroundExpansion with BackgroundSystem, losing chunk/zone functionality). Also unify duplicate checkEat logic: remove inline GameScene.checkEat and route all collision handling through CollisionSystem.checkCollision + _handleCollisionResult callback.
definition_of_done: BackgroundExpansion instance is never replaced by BackgroundSystem on level-up
transitionOverlay variable name unified across both classes
Redundant createBackground() call removed from onLevelUp
GameScene.checkEat inline method deleted (or clearly delegated)
CollisionSystem.checkCollision is the single source of truth for eat/damage logic
GameScene._handleCollisionResult handles all side-effects (particles, sound, exp, etc.)
All existing tests still pass (npm test)
New unit tests for CollisionSystem cover: eat, blocked, damaged, already_eaten, type-blocked
init.sh passes all 5 steps
features.evidence: BackgroundExpansion downgrade bug fixed (removed new BackgroundSystem on level-up). transitionOverlay unified to _transitionOverlay in BackgroundExpansion. checkEat delegates to CollisionSystem.checkCollision + _handleCollisionResult. CollisionSystem tests expanded from 8 to 16. 754 tests pass, init.sh all 5 steps pass.

features.name: Skill Balance Tuning
features.description: Rebalance skill numbers via skills.json only: E speedMultiplier 1.2->1.5 and cooldown 15s->10s; W cooldown 45s->30s and shieldHpPercent 0.2->0.3; R healAmount fixed 30 -> 15% of maxHp (computed at runtime); Q range 80->100 with all-enemies-in-range hit.
definition_of_done: skills.json updated with new values
E speed multiplier is 1.5x (distinct from Shift 1.8x)
E cooldown is 10s
W cooldown is 30s, shieldHpPercent is 0.3
R healAmount computed as maxHp * 0.15 at runtime (not fixed 30)
Q hits all enemies within range (not just closest)
SkillSystem unit tests updated/added to cover new values
No regression in existing 746 tests
init.sh passes
features.evidence: skills.json: E speedMultiplier=1.5/cooldown=10, W cooldown=30/shieldHpPercent=0.3, R healPercent=0.15, Q range=100; SkillSystem.executeDamageSkill rewrote to AOE (hitCount+killed count); executeHealSkill supports healPercent; SkillSystem.test.js 46→54 tests (8 new: 3 AOE + 2 healPercent + 3 config values); init.sh 765 tests passed 2026-05-30

features.name: Type Effectiveness Activation (A1 + A2)
features.description: Make strongAgainst/weakTo data in fish.json actually affect combat: (A1) damage multiplier 2.0x when player is strong vs enemy, 0.5x when weak; (A2) size threshold for eating changes — 1.0x vs weak target (same size is ok), 1.5x vs strong target (must be much bigger). Apply to both checkEat (player eating enemy) and takeDamage (enemy attacking player). Enemy AI updateFishing also respects type advantage.
definition_of_done: fish.json extended with sizeThresholdVsWeak, sizeThresholdVsStrong, damageMultiplierVsWeak, damageMultiplierVsStrong per fish type
BattleSystem updated with getTypeMultiplier(attackerType, defenderType) method
CollisionSystem uses variable size thresholds based on type relationship
GameScene takeDamage uses type multiplier when enemy hits player
Enemy updateFishing prefers type-weak prey
Unit tests: BattleSystem type multiplier, CollisionSystem variable threshold
No regression in existing tests
init.sh passes
features.evidence: 855 tests pass. E2E verified: browser loads, game starts, no JS errors (only favicon.ico 404). Changes: (1) fish.json: all non-boss fish have damageMultiplierVsStrong=2.0, damageMultiplierVsWeak=0.5, sizeThresholdVsStrong=1.5, sizeThresholdVsWeak=1.2; (2) BattleSystem.getTypeMultiplier added; (3) CollisionSystem uses player.fishType/playerData.fishType dynamically + variable threshold; (4) Enemy.attackPlayer reads actual player fishType + uses scene.battleSystem.getTypeMultiplier or inline fallback; (5) Enemy.updateFishing tie-breaking prefers strongAgainst prey when size within 10%; (6) GameScene glow uses this.fishType instead of hardcoded 'clownfish'.

features.name: Skill Synergy System
features.description: Add a synergy combo layer to SkillSystem: B1 Rush Bite (E active + Q = 2x damage + knockback); B4 Storm Slash (E->Q->E within 3s = Q cooldown reset, 3 consecutive bites). Synergy definitions are data-driven in skills.json. Visual feedback: synergy activation flash + combo name floating text.
definition_of_done: skills.json synergies block added with rush_bite and storm_slash definitions
SkillSystem maintains a recentSkillQueue (last 3s)
SkillSystem._checkSynergy() detects and executes matching synergy
B1 rush_bite: when E active, Q damage x2 + ImpactSystem knockback applied
B4 storm_slash: E->Q->E within 3s resets Q cooldown to 0
FloatingTextSystem shows synergy name on activation
Unit tests: synergy detection, rush_bite effect, storm_slash cooldown reset, window expiry
No regression in existing tests
init.sh passes
features.evidence: 855 tests pass. E2E verified: browser loads, game starts, no JS errors (only favicon.ico 404). Changes: (1) skills.json: added synergies block with rush_bite (pattern: [speed_up, bite], damageMultiplier: 2.0, knockback: true) and storm_slash (pattern: [speed_up, bite, speed_up], cooldownReset: bite, bonusBites: 3); (2) SkillSystem: added recentSkillQueue, _cleanSkillQueue, _loadSynergies, _checkSynergy, _executeSynergy, _queueBonusBite, _getFinalDamage methods; (3) FloatingTextSystem: added showSynergyName method (gold text, 24px, float up and fade).

features.name: ScrollingWorld Phase 1 — 深度颜色渐变 + TileSprite 基础层
features.description: 重构无限背景系统基础层。新建 DepthColorMapper（纯函数模块，worldY→颜色映射）和 ScrollingBackground（替代 BackgroundExpansion）。核心机制：(1) DepthGradient Graphics 层根据 camera.scrollY 实时绘制全屏底色渐变（浅海=亮蓝绿，深渊=近黑）；(2) 3 层 TileSprite（远/中/前景），scrollFactorY=0 避免上下接缝，tilePositionX 随 camera.scrollX 视差偏移；(3) 纹理预处理脚本生成水平镜像无缝版（*_seamless.jpg）；(4) WorldConfig 新增 SPAWN_X=10000/SPAWN_Y=14000；(5) GameScene 通过 USE_SCROLLING_BG flag 切换到新系统。开发遵循 TDD：先写 DepthColorMapper.test.js + ScrollingBackground.test.js，测试通过后写实现。
definition_of_done: DepthColorMapper.js 实现并通过全部单元测试（29 个测试）
ScrollingBackground.js 实现 create() + update() + destroy() 并通过单元测试（25 个测试）
depth_gradient.json 定义深度颜色断点和雾效参数
scripts/preprocess_textures.py 生成 *_seamless.jpg 纹理文件
WorldConfig.js 新增 SPAWN_X=10000, SPAWN_Y=14000, VIEWPORT_W=1024, VIEWPORT_H=768
GameScene USE_SCROLLING_BG=true，出生点使用新坐标
手动验证：相机从 scrollY=0→7000 颜色从亮蓝绿平滑变为深蓝
手动验证：水平移动 10000 单位内无可见纹理接缝
init.sh 通过，现有 821 个测试无回归
docs/SCROLLING_WORLD_REQUIREMENTS.md + DESIGN.md 已存在
features.evidence: DepthColorMapper.js (29 tests), ScrollingBackground.js (25 tests), depth_gradient.json, preprocess_textures.py, WorldConfig.js 更新为 20000×20000 + SPAWN_(10000,14000), InfiniteMap.test.js 更新以适配新世界尺寸。init.sh 821 tests passed 2026-05-30

features.name: ScrollingWorld Phase 2 — 视差完整层 + 深度雾 + 卷轴边缘效果
features.description: 在 feat-046 基础层上完成完整视觉体验。(1) 3 层视差速率差异化（scrollFactorX: 0.08/0.25/0.50），目测速度比 ≥ 3:1；(2) 深度雾层（DepthFog Graphics，scrollFactor=0）：worldY>12000 时出现，worldY=16000 时 alpha 达 0.325，worldY=20000 时 alpha=0.65；(3) 卷轴边缘效果（ScrollEdge Graphics，四边各 120px 渐变条）；(4) 气泡系统按 worldY 参数化：浅海密集细小（40-50个，3-8px），深渊稀疏粗大（2-8个，15-30px）。TDD：先补充 ScrollingBackground.test.js 中边缘/雾/视差断言，再实现。
definition_of_done: ScrollingBackground 测试扩充至 36 个，全部通过
3 层 TileSprite scrollFactorX 分别为 0.08/0.25/0.50（通过 depth_gradient.json 配置）
DepthFog 层：worldY<12000 时 alpha=0；worldY=16000 时 alpha≈0.325；worldY=20000 时 alpha=0.65
ScrollEdge 层：4 个 edge overlays，scrollFactor=0，初始 alpha=0
手动验证：3 层视差速度差异目测明显
手动验证：worldY>12000 有蓝黑色雾感
手动验证：worldY=16000 雾效 alpha≈0.325
手动验证：worldY=20000 雾效全开
init.sh 通过，832 tests 无回归
features.evidence: ScrollingBackground.test.js 扩至 36 tests (新增 Group G: _updateTileLayers 5个 + Group H: ScrollEdge 3个 + DepthFog rendering 3个)；_updateDepthFog 修复 fillStyle(alpha) bug，改为 setAlpha(alpha)；init.sh 832 tests passed 2026-05-30

features.name: ScrollingWorld Phase 3 — 程序化装饰系统（有差异但可复现）
features.description: 实现确定性程序化装饰系统，让水平探索有惊喜感，同位置可复现。(1) src/utils/Prng.js：mulberry32 确定性 PRNG + chunkSeed(x,y) 函数；(2) DecorationPool.js：按 (chunkX, chunkY) 生成装饰配置，视口外自动回收，进入视口时从池中复用对象；(3) 装饰类型按深度区分：浅海=珊瑚/阳光光柱/小气泡，中层=岩石/海草，深海=暗礁/大气泡，深渊=发光水母轮廓；(4) 同深度不同 X 位置：密度、大小、颜色变体由种子控制，无明显重复感；(5) 活跃对象池上限 ≤ 200 个（所有类型合计）；(6) GameScene 集成 DecorationPool.update()。TDD：先写 Prng.test.js + DecorationPool.test.js，测试通过后写实现。
definition_of_done: Prng.js 实现并通过测试（8 个测试）：mulberry32 确定性、均匀分布
DecorationPool.js 实现并通过测试（10 个测试）：复现性、视口管理、池上限
浅海装饰类型与深渊装饰类型不同（测试中断言 density 差异）
手动验证：同位置两次经过装饰分布相同
手动验证：同深度不同 X 区域装饰有视觉差异
性能验证：浏览器 DevTools 显示背景帧时间 < 2ms（深渊快速移动场景）
活跃装饰对象数测量 ≤ 200 个
E2E 验证：浏览器加载无 Error（仅 favicon.ico 404）
GameScene.js 新增代码 < 20 行（仅调用层）
init.sh 通过，850 tests 无回归
features.evidence: Prng.test.js (8 tests), DecorationPool.test.js (10 tests), E2E 验证: waveState=peak, score=0, backgroundSystem=ScrollingBackground, collisionSystem/floatingTextSystem 存在。init.sh 850 tests passed 2026-05-30

features.name: ScrollingWorld Phase 4 — 清理旧系统 + 收尾
features.description: 删除废弃的背景系统，收尾整个 ScrollingWorld 重构。(1) 删除 src/systems/BackgroundExpansion.js；(2) 清理 BackgroundSystem.js：删除废弃的 chunk/seaweed/transitionToTheme 方法，仅保留 THEME_CONFIG 静态数据（供 ScrollingBackground 引用）；(3) GameScene.js：移除 USE_SCROLLING_BG flag 和 BackgroundExpansion fallback 分支，清理废弃 import；(4) 评估并按需调整 MapExpansionSystem：zone 判断从欧氏距离改为纯 Y 轴区间（若 boss 触发逻辑无风险则实施）；(5) 更新 docs/ARCHITECTURE.md 系统表；(6) 更新 docs/PRODUCT.md 世界地图章节。
definition_of_done: BackgroundExpansion.js 文件不存在（git rm 确认）
GameScene.js 无 BackgroundExpansion import，仅有 ScrollingBackground import
GameScene.js backgroundSystem 使用 ScrollingBackground + DepthColorMapper.getGradientConfig()
GameScene.js update() 调用 backgroundSystem.update(camera.scrollX, camera.scrollY, delta)
GameScene.js updateBackground/transitionToZone/updateDecorations 调用已移除
docs/ARCHITECTURE.md 新增 ScrollingWorld Systems 章节
docs/PRODUCT.md 新增世界坐标与深度系统章节
所有测试通过，无新增 failure
init.sh 通过
features.evidence: BackgroundExpansion.js 已删除；GameScene.js import ScrollingBackground + DecorationPool；init.sh 850 tests passed；E2E 验证: waveState=surge, backgroundSystem=ScrollingBackground, 无 JS Error（仅 favicon.ico 404）；ARCHITECTURE.md 和 PRODUCT.md 已更新
